scripts.data:refresh: bun run scrape && bun run fetch:ingredient-icons && bun run db:seed
scripts.typecheck: tsgo --noEmit -p web/tsconfig.json && tsgo --noEmit -p web/tsconfig.scripts.json && tsgo --noEmit -p web/tsconfig.node.json && tsgo --noEmit -p server/tsconfig.json && tsgo --noEmit -p scripts/tsconfig.json && tsgo --noEmit -p tests/tsconfig.json && tsgo --noEmit -p libs/tsconfig.json
scripts.lint: oxlint --type-aware web/src web/scripts server/src scripts tests libs
scripts.lint:fix: oxlint --type-aware --fix web/src web/scripts server/src scripts tests libs
scripts.fmt: oxfmt web/src web/scripts web/vite.config.ts server/src scripts tests libs package.json web/package.json server/package.json tsconfig.base.json web/tsconfig.json web/tsconfig.scripts.json web/tsconfig.node.json server/tsconfig.json scripts/tsconfig.json tests/tsconfig.json libs/tsconfig.json
scripts.fmt:check: oxfmt --check web/src web/scripts web/vite.config.ts server/src scripts tests libs package.json web/package.json server/package.json tsconfig.base.json web/tsconfig.json web/tsconfig.scripts.json web/tsconfig.node.json server/tsconfig.json scripts/tsconfig.json tests/tsconfig.json libs/tsconfig.json
scripts.validate:pre-commit: bun run lint && bun run fmt:check && bun run typecheck && bun run --cwd web check:react-compiler && bun run --cwd web check:no-manual-memo && bun run check:actionlint
